caption: A man with blonde, spiked hair and glasses is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a patterned bowtie, along with black over-ear headphones. In the background, a white wall features a framed logo of a green shield, while a blurred storefront window displays the words "UNIQUE FASHIONS". On the left side of the screen, a red and white logo reads "#BESTTALK PODCAST", and on the right, red text reads "BEST TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, shifting his gaze and slightly moving his head as he speaks, while the camera and surrounding environment remain static.
